title: Unstable SMP+
description: This is a fan-made plugin based on Unstable SMP by Furiusfighter213
body:
UnstableSMP is a death-ban plugin for Minecraft Survival Multiplayer (SMP) servers based on Paper/Spigot. The plugin implements a hardcore-like gameplay system where players are automatically banned from the server upon death and can only be revived by administrators using the /revive <player> command.

The plugin is ideal for SMP servers that want to create higher risk and more excitement for their players. It tracks all kills, displays death events, and automatically manages the ban system. With configurable sound notifications (up to 250 blocks range), nearby players are immediately informed when a teammate dies.

✨ Features
⚡ Death Ban System
Automatic ban on death. Players must be revived.

📊 Kill Tracking
Tracks all kills and statistics.

🔊 Sound Notifications
Death sound audible up to 250 blocks away.

🎮 Revive System
Admin command to revive players.
Basically all of the Unstable SMP Features with some extras 
Made By Furiusfighter213
